title: pimpinella hircina
intro: Pimpinella hircina, also known as the burn plant, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pimpinella hircina include its ability to treat various conditions such as burns, wounds, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of Pimpinella hircina include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
